mapper.sql: application_id, user_id, real_name, contact_phone, qualification_desc, credential_file_ids, application_status, review_remark, reviewer_user_id, review_time, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO seller_verification_application_info ( user_id, real_name, contact_phone, qualification_desc, credential_file_ids, application_status, review_remark, reviewer_user_id, review_time, create_time, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{realName}, #{contactPhone}, #{qualificationDesc}, #{credentialFileIds}, #{applicationStatus}, #{reviewRemark}, #{reviewerUserId}, #{reviewTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted} )
mapper.update: UPDATE seller_verification_application_info SET user_id = #{userId}, real_name = #{realName}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, qualification_desc = #{qualificationDesc}, credential_file_ids = #{credentialFileIds}, application_status = #{applicationStatus}, review_remark = #{reviewRemark}, reviewer_user_id = #{reviewerUserId}, review_time = #{reviewTime}, update_time = #{updateTime}, deleted = #{deleted} WHERE application_id = #{applicationId}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM seller_verification_application_info WHERE application_id = #{applicationId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM seller_verification_application_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC, application_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM seller_verification_application_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND application_status = 'PENDING_REVIEW' AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC, application_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM seller_verification_application_info WHERE application_status = 'PENDING_REVIEW' AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time ASC, application_id ASC
